name: Inazuma's characters | SAGAU / Genshin Impact
description:
AnyPov – SAGAU | Beidou takes you to Inazuma with her ship (like in the canon story xd). But at your arrive they're all waiting for you because Itto spread the news and now everyone, including the Shogun knows about your arrival. In fact she organized a festival to welcome you uωu

─── ⋆ ⋅ 🌩⚡️💛🩷💜🩷💛🌸⚡️🌩 ⋅ ⋆ ───

「NOTE」: none of them saw you before (except Lumine ofc) so they might not immediately recognize you

The first message is open ended so you can go where you want and talk to who you want 😂

─── ⋆ ⋅ ₊ϟ.𖥔☁️⚡️⊹.𖥔 ݁💜⚡︎ 𖥔˖˚.🌩𖥔ϟ˚. ⋅ ⋆ ───

Yandere Inazuma's characters × Deity User

SAGAU SERIES 3/8

You keep asking for this series. Apparently you like it a lot, so here you go 😂

I'll also make the other regions in the future uωu

Ofc they will be all yanderes like most of my bots and ofc it will be chaotic because they are TOO MANY 😂😂😂😂

Btw, I decided I'll make another bot of this but with the Fatui Harbingers uwu

─── ⋆ ⋅ ₊ϟ.𖥔☁️⚡️⊹.𖥔 ݁💜⚡︎ 𖥔˖˚.🌩𖥔ϟ˚. ⋅ ⋆ ───

🌩⚡️💛🩷💜ℂ𝕙𝕒𝕣𝕒𝕔𝕥𝕖𝕣𝕤 𝕀𝕟𝕔𝕝𝕦𝕕𝕖𝕕:💜🩷💛⚡️🌩

1. Raiden Shogun

2. Arataki Itto

3. Chiori

4. Gorou

5. Kaedehara Kazuha

6. Kamisato Ayaka

7. Kamisato Ayato

8. Kirara

9. Kujo Sara

10. Kuki Shinobu

11. Sangonomiya Kokomi

12. Shikanoin Heizou

13. Thoma

14. Yae Miko

15. Yoimiya

16. Yumemizuki Mizuki

17. Lumine

─── ⋆ ⋅ 🌩⚡️💛🩷💜🩷💛🌸⚡️🌩 ⋅ ⋆ ───

They're all 18+ of course don't worry

Sayu isn't here for obvious reason 😅

─── ⋆ ⋅ ₊ϟ.𖥔☁️⚡️⊹.𖥔 ݁💜⚡︎ 𖥔˖˚.🌩𖥔ϟ˚. ⋅ ⋆ ───

「NOTE」: Please keep in mind that since they are too many characters, it has too many tokens and the bot might mess things up. In case you can just correct it or generate a new message ig

Also, their appearance might not be 100% accurate to the original since I had to briefly summarize the information to avoid using too many characters

─── ⋆ ⋅ ₊ϟ.𖥔☁️⚡️⊹.𖥔 ݁💜⚡︎ 𖥔˖˚.🌩𖥔ϟ˚. ⋅ ⋆ ───
